stem: FAA-G13 (Guidelines on Addressing Conflicts of Interest in Research) applies to a financial adviser that provides which financial advisory service?

options.A: Marketing life policies at a roadshow
options.B: Issuing or promulgating research analyses or research reports concerning an investment product
options.C: Operating an online direct channel for the sale of life policies
options.D: Providing digital advisory services through algorithm-based tools

explanation: 教材 10A 第 1 段:FAA-G13 适用于以发出或传播涉及投资产品的研究分析/研究报告方式提供咨询服务的财务顾问。A 属 FSG-G02、C 属 FAA-G15、D 属 CMG-G02。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10A — FAA-G13 para 1

stem: Under FAA-G13, for how long must a Financial Institution maintain records of the bases and supporting documents of its analysts' research recommendations?

options.A: Not less than 3 years from the date of publication
options.B: Not less than 5 years from the date of publication
options.C: Not less than 7 years from the date of publication

explanation: 教材 10A 第 14 段明确:机构应将研究建议的依据与支持文件自发布之日起保存不少于 5 年。其余年限均非教材所载。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10A — FAA-G13 para 14

stem: Under FAA-G13, which arrangement concerning analysts' reporting lines and compensation is required?

options.A: Research reports must be reviewed and approved by the corporate finance advisory function before release
options.B: An analyst's bonus should be tied to the corporate finance deals he supports
options.C: Analysts should be separate from staff performing sales trading, dealing or corporate finance advisory, and their pay must not be based on such transactions
options.D: Analysts and dealers should share a single reporting line to improve coordination

explanation: 教材 10A 第 9–10 段:分析师须与销售交易、自营、企业融资咨询职能分开,设独立汇报线;研究报告不得由这些职能审阅或批准;薪酬不得基于任何销售交易、自营或企业融资交易。故 A、B、D 均与指引相反。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10A — FAA-G13 paras 9–10

stem: Under FAA-G15, when must a financial adviser also make an equivalent Direct Purchase Insurance product (DPI) available on its online direct channel?

options.A: Only when the client specifically requests a DPI
options.B: Never — DPIs may only be sold through a human adviser
options.C: In all cases, regardless of whether the FA has an online platform
options.D: Where it offers a specific life policy online and the insurer currently offers an equivalent DPI

explanation: 教材 10B 第 8–9 段:在网上直接渠道提供某保单前,应先确定该保险公司是否提供等值 DPI;若有,则应在该渠道一并提供。MAS 不强制所有 FA 上线 DPI(故 C 错),但有网上平台者须提供。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10B — FAA-G15 paras 8–9

stem: Among the prominent statements FAA-G15 requires before a client completes an online purchase of a life policy, what is the stated free-look period?
explanation: 教材 10B 第 10(c)(iv) 段:须提示客户有 14 天自由检视期(free-look period)。其余天数均非教材所载。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10B — FAA-G15 para 10

stem: Under FAA-G16, Regulation 32CB prescribes a relevant entity as an exempt financial adviser under which provision of the FAA?
explanation: 教材 10C 第 6 段:Reg 32CB 将相关实体规定为第 23(1)(f) 条下的获豁免财务顾问。第 64 条是这些指引的发出依据,而非豁免依据。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10C — FAA-G16 para 6

stem: Under FAA-G16, which jurisdictions are listed in the Appendix as ASEAN participating countries with Recognised ACMF Members?
explanation: 教材 10C 附录列明三个参与国及其认可成员:泰国(SEC)、马来西亚(SC)、菲律宾(SEC)。其余组合包含未列入附录的国家。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10C — FAA-G16 Appendix

stem: Under FAA-G16, which is one of the assessment criteria the Authority considers when deciding whether to approve an arrangement under Regulation 32CB?

options.A: The relevant entity maintains minimum assets under management of S$1 billion
options.B: The relevant entity possesses a minimum of five years' corporate track record in the specific financial advisory services it proposes to effect
options.C: The relevant entity is incorporated in Singapore
options.D: The relevant entity holds a Capital Markets Services licence for fund management

explanation: 教材 10C 第 10 段:评估标准(非详尽)包括在拟提供服务上有至少 5 年企业往绩、该 5 年内财务稳健且诚实公平履职、并在指定东盟国持牌受认可成员监管。S$10 亿 AUM 与新加坡注册并非 32CB 的标准(前者属 CMG-G02 数字顾问语境)。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10C — FAA-G16 para 10

stem: Under CMG-G02, when may a digital adviser operating as an FA rely on the 'Dealing Exemption' from holding a CMS licence for dealing in capital markets products?

options.A: Only if the client accepts the specific recommendation made by the digital adviser
options.B: Only for OTC derivatives contracts passed to a brokerage firm
options.C: When it merely assists to pass on clients' buy or sell orders to brokerage firms for execution, incidental to its financial advisory activities
options.D: When it takes custody of clients' moneys to settle the trades

explanation: 教材 10D 第 16–18 段:Dealing Exemption 适用于仅将客户买卖盘传予经纪行执行且附带于咨询活动的情形,适用于除 OTC 衍生合约外的指定产品。其与客户是否接受具体建议无关(故 A 错);B 方向相反;FA 数字顾问不得持有客户资产(故 D 错)。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10D — CMG-G02 paras 16–18

stem: Under CMG-G02, the 'Fund Management Exemption' for periodic portfolio rebalancing is limited to portfolios comprising:

options.B: Solely listed and unlisted collective investment schemes (CIS)
options.C: Any mix of CIS and individual securities

explanation: 教材 10D 第 20–21 段:基金管理豁免仅限于仅由上市与非上市 CIS 组成的组合再平衡;含个别证券的组合需 FA 就具体证券给出意见并取得客户同意,故不在豁免范围。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10D — CMG-G02 paras 20–21

stem: Under CMG-G02, who is ultimately responsible and accountable for the proper development, monitoring and testing of a digital adviser's client-facing tools?

options.A: The third-party technology provider that white-labels the platform
options.B: The independent human adviser conducting post-transaction sample testing
options.D: The Board and Senior Management, even where they delegate day-to-day operational oversight

explanation: 教材 10D 第 28、30 段:董事会与高级管理层对客户端工具的治理与监督负最终责任;即便将日常运营监督委托他人,仍对其妥善开发、监控与测试负责。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10D — CMG-G02 paras 28, 30

stem: Under CMG-G02, a fully-automated digital adviser relying on the FAA-N16 Exception (not collecting full information under paras 11(c)–(i)) must still satisfy all required conditions. Which of the following is NOT one of those conditions?

options.A: The advice is fully automated with no human adviser intervention in the advisory process
options.B: There are in-built 'knock-out' or threshold questions to identify and eliminate unsuitable clients
options.C: The advice is limited to CIS that are in substance Excluded Investment Products (EIPs)
options.D: The adviser need not collect any information on the client's financial objectives or risk tolerance

explanation: 教材 10D 第 47–48 段:即使适用 FAA-N16 豁免,数字顾问仍须采取合理步骤收集客户的财务目标与风险承受度,以确认建议适合。A、B、C 均为豁免的必备条件,故 D 不是条件且与教材相反。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10D — CMG-G02 paras 47–48

stem: Under FSG-G02 Safeguard 2, mystery shopping exercises and site visits should be conducted on a regular basis and cover at least what proportion of the financial institution's marketing and distribution arrangements in that year?
explanation: 教材 10E 第 2.1.12 段:神秘购物与现场巡查应全年定期进行,并覆盖该机构当年至少一半的营销分销安排。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10E — FSG-G02 para 2.1.12 (Safeguard 2)

stem: Under FSG-G02, for which sales is a financial institution expected to implement Safeguard 1 (call-backs or surveys before or within the free-look/cooling-off period)?

options.A: Banking and general insurance products related to the main product bought
options.B: Simple life policies sold as an ancillary product to loans with a simple payment basis
options.C: Life insurance policies, accident and health policies, and collective investment schemes

explanation: 教材 10E Safeguard 1:机构应对人寿保单、意外与健康保单及集合投资计划的销售实施回访/调查。作为简单还款贷款附带的简单人寿保单被排除(故 B 错);A 属 Safeguard 2 的豁免范畴;回访仅适用于有自由检视/冷静期的产品,故并非毫无例外(D 错)。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.10E — FSG-G02 Safeguard 1
